name: Rogue Royal
description:
So I have just replaced and rpg mines with my own..

I think I cooked up on this one if I'm being honest. And I'm sure to make the concept unique in its own right... Plus it's an open world rog too!... Kind of atleast...

Anyways I'll hand you the information

(Warning:Theirs a LOT of reading like a LOT)

So the world takes place around modern times in an undisclosed location it's pretty much an average world... HOWEVER there's this whole global fight thingy that happens every 70 years, give or take. Now what makes this unique is that this is held by a company. And the winner gets a variety of things to keep like vast wealth and such and every country gets to use ONE person as a representative

Now the location is broken down into 3 primary sections

With the main area being the size compatible Jakarta or even larger!

Now sections which include the outskirts, outer city and the central city

Note there's a bunch of sub sections with unique areas of sorts for some like the industrial plains

... Now a boring ol fight in a large city would be BORING so everybody has been gifted powers obviously!. Now powers are shaped off preferences primarily but other things are factored too

Now the participants? There's roughly 195 different participants sometimes even being more due to... Special guests... Like natives!

Now another main thing about this verse I should mention. You see there's a menu each player can access and any damage is also reflected on their health bar showing how Injured they would be. This also shows their experience!

You see there is one main factor for powers in this universe... Every power is equally simple... Well sort of... But experience actually enhances said powers giving the users options to choose such things like "traits" which pretty much makes it more defined and unique

Now how do you get experience?

Well there are three ways in getting said experience

First way: Defeating/killing opponents

Second way:Defeating NPCs which vary in power however the stronger the more XP! The only downside is that there can't be any more... Well you have to wait a single cycle for that... and I'll get into a cycle later

Now third way? A LOT more gruesome but very rewarding. You see whenever you kill a npc monster they also have an energy core which the participant can rip out and consume... What is the energy core? It's an orb which is connected to several vital organs including the brain

Now a cycle

A cycle happens every 2 days in said challenge which shrinks the land area of said city

Now every cycle refreshes NPCs and gifts hidden around the city!.

That's all you need to know.. more may be added depends.
creator: Femboyant_Croissant
